name: 食物链与能量流
subject: biology
domain_name: 生态与人类影响 / Ecology & Human Impact / Ecology & Human Impact
curriculum_points:
3 Describe the functions of the following components of blood:
(a) red blood cells in transporting oxygen, including the role of haemoglobin
(b) white blood cells in phagocytosis and antibody production
(c) platelets in clotting (details are not required)
(d) plasma in the transport of blood cells, ions, nutrients, urea, hormones and carbon dioxide
4 State the roles of blood clotting as preventing blood loss and the entry of pathogens
7 Describe the process of clotting as the conversion of fibrinogen to fibrin to form a mesh

excerpts.text:
3 Describe the functions of the following components of blood:
(a) red blood cells in transporting oxygen, including the role of haemoglobin
(b) white blood cells in phagocytosis and antibody production
(c) platelets in clotting (details are not required)
(d) plasma in the transport of blood cells, ions, nutrients, urea, hormones and carbon dioxide
4 State the roles of blood clotting as preventing blood loss and the entry of pathogens
7 Describe the process of clotting as the conversion of fibrinogen to fibrin to form a mesh

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「食物链与能量流」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：3 Describe the functions of the following components of blood:
(a) red blood cells in transporting oxygen, including the…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：4 State the roles of blood clotting as preventing blood loss and the entry of pa… 对理解「食物链与能量流」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
